description: A designed Tren de Aragua 'arrest card' in ICE's recurring template (square). A blue header bar reads 'TdA ARREST' in large gold serif caps. The center background is a candid/in-custody photo of a man with wavy dark hair in an orange jail uniform against a cinderblock detention wall, looking at the camera. Overlaid at left in bold white sans-serif is the name across four lines: 'Yerbis Manuel Garcia-Quintero.' A red banner across the lower portion lists the charges in white caps: 'KIDNAPPING, FALSE IMPRISONMENT, ROBBERY AND ASSAULT WITH A WEAPON, EXTORTION & WITNESS INITIMIDATION' (note 'INITIMIDATION' typo). A bottom blue footer bar shows the circular DHS seal with 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' (white) at left and 'Tren de Aragua' in gold serif at right. The card uses an extensive violent-charge list and most-wanted styling to dramatize the gang threat for the general public.
notable_text: TdA ARREST; Yerbis Manuel Garcia-Quintero; KIDNAPPING, FALSE IMPRISONMENT, ROBBERY AND ASSAULT WITH A WEAPON, EXTORTION & WITNESS INITIMIDATION; Tren de Aragua
